title: JOYIN 18 Piece Pull Back Car Assorted Mini Truck Model Car, Friction Powered Race Cars Vehicle Set for Toddlers, Boys, and Girls’ Educational Pretend and Play
features: SUPER VALUE PACK. Our Cool Friction-Powered Model Cars Toy Vehicles Set includes 18 toy cars in total: fire engine, cleaning car, Dump Truck, Excavator, Crane, and more.

REAL FUNCTION. Our Friction Powered Cars Assorted Vehicles Toy Set for Toddlers & Kids can withstand rough use and bumps on the wall! There are no sharp edges or corners that can hurt your child. Bright and colorful. Friction powered, no battery needed. Just pull it back and let it go forward naturally, the smooth wheels can keep the car running for a long time.

ENDLESS FUN. Our Pull Back Toy Cars Vehicle Set for Boys & Girls is ideal for boosting your child’s vocabulary development, hand-eye coordination, motor skills, pretend and play and narrative role-play skills! It’s a perfect gift for holiday toys, school classroom prize, kids intelligent learning toys, baby shower gifts, birthday parties, and more!
PREMIUM QUALITY. Child safe: non-toxic, non-BPA, and lead-free durable ABS plastic. Meet toy standard. Safety test approved

CUSTOMER SATISFACTION. Providing a 100% satisfaction experience is our main priority to our customers. Feel free to message us through “contact sellers” if products don't meet your expectations. The celebrations start at JOYIN!
